image-reveal.name: Image Reveal
image-reveal.description: An image reveal effect using diagonal stripes masking and sliding clip-paths.

image-stack.name: Image Stack
image-stack.description: A swipeable stack of cards with spring physics and dismiss handlers.

image-parallax.name: Image Parallax
image-parallax.description: A smooth mouse-move and scroll-driven parallax image perspective effect.

living-text.name: Living Text
living-text.description: Stretches, rotates, and pushes characters dynamically based on real-time cursor proximity.

gravity-card-stack.name: Gravity Card Stack
gravity-card-stack.description: Falling rigid body physics cards container that reacts to scroll triggers.

morphing-nav.name: Morphing Nav
morphing-nav.description: An interactive navigation bar with liquid morphing SVG background shapes.

story-timeline.name: Story Timeline
story-timeline.description: A scroll-animated vertical narrative timeline with counting stats and slide-in nodes.

void-button.name: Void Button
void-button.description: Pure black button that reveals a luxury gold gradient under the cursor via a smooth radial mask.

brushed-titanium-button.name: Brushed Titanium Button
brushed-titanium-button.description: Machined titanium texture with anisotropic highlight sweeps and reactive spotlight illumination.

liquid-gold-button.name: Liquid Gold Button
liquid-gold-button.description: Conic gradient rotating behind a frosted glass blur layer, with a 1px border that catches light only at the top.

guilloche-button.name: Guilloche Button
guilloche-button.description: Watch dial Guilloché patterns generating Moire wave shapes under the cursor spotlight.

pixel-melt.name: Pixel Melt
pixel-melt.description: A full-viewport pixel grid that glows and cools under cursor heat, leaving behind a slow melt trail.

breathing-grid.name: Breathing Grid
breathing-grid.description: An orthogonal grid with a slow left-to-right traveling wave, with local brightness boost near the cursor.

floating-embers.name: Floating Embers
floating-embers.description: Glowing ember particles that float upward with a gentle sway, reacting subtly to cursor and scroll.

scanline-drift.name: Scanline Drift
scanline-drift.description: A horizontal band of light that drifts across the screen, available in three moods: warm CRT afterglow, ethereal aurora, or zen shimmer.

molten-obsidian.name: Molten Obsidian
molten-obsidian.description: A WebGL obsidian material background with specular highlights that react to cursor movement.
